CustomField.description: Gets checked for records whose role is required for LOI approval
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(Name = 'Marketing', Name = 'Technical', Name = 'Legal', Name = 'Compliance', Name = 'Credit', Name = 'Tax'), True, False )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Is the role of this Deal Team member a role that is required for LOI sign off?
CustomField.label: LOI Approver Role?
